---
title: "Dr. Caroline Wormeley Latimer M.D., (b.1859)"
---

## Dr. Caroline Wormeley Latimer M.D., (b.1859)

**Dates:** contributor to <i>MP</i> (1887, 92)

### Description

physician

### Biography

Daughter of Elizabeth Wormeley Latimer.

### Letters

- Letter from Mar 5th 1896

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
